data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the service menu displayed on Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that the 'Service menu displayed on Google' is satisfied. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to the display of the service menu on Google. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings and configurations, none of them directly address the specific requirement of the service menu visibility, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the service menu being displayed on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for service menu display
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the service menu is displayed on Google.
